rules.description: When any basic need score is critical, force survival mode regardless of current stage
Do not generate a plan if form completeness is below 40%
rules.override: redirect_to(WELCOME, 'Please complete more of the form first')

rules.description: If debt-to-income > 50%, prioritize debt advice over savings advice
If emergency fund is less than 1 month AND has debt, recommend fund before aggressive payoff
rules.override: add_warning('Build emergency fund before aggressive debt payoff')

rules.description: If user sentiment is overwhelmed, switch to stress management first
